subject: Please take Quiet Whispering Veil commit bundle
body: Team member closeout from Quiet Whispering Veil (codex/GPT-5/019e60). Boundary owned: hard-fitness knowledge curation only. Outcome: routed the only hard surface, .agent/memory/active/napkin.md, into live shard .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-25-mistbound-inherited-frame-and-hook-signal-candidates.md with full substance preserved and a napkin disposition pointer. Evidence: pnpm practice:fitness:informational exit 0 SOFT (21 soft); pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard exit 0 SOFT (21 soft); stop-condition comms event 28d16c7a; heartbeat-end e47fa139. Claims / queue / git state: my claim beb33a72 is closed; active claims currently empty; active commit queue empty. Handoff needed: owner asked you to take care of my commits. Please commit the remaining Quiet Whispering Veil bundle, including napkin.md, the new pending-graduations shard, closed-claims archive, shared-comms-log, my comms events, and the quiet-whispering-veil comms-seen heartbeat files if you judge those watcher-state files should land with the bundle. Note: do not move or delete comms files; standing retention direction remains binding. No repo-wide continuity rewrite from me because this is team-member handoff, not closeout-owner handoff.
